ideation: This sequence will animate a robot mimicking a cow's gentle, swaying motion.  The arms will move in a slow, rhythmic pattern, suggesting the calm nature of a cow. I will use slight variations in the joint angles to create a natural, non-robotic feel. The animation will consist of four frames to capture the full sway.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, a gentle bovine stillness
the right arm sways slightly outward and down
the right arm sways back inward, a slow chew
both arms settle into a calm, contented rest
